representative_quote: Helloo Durr, ik your exams are tomorrow and you'd be super busy but i just wanted to drop a quick message to say how awesome you are for getting this far in the finals prep, seriously, your dedication is no joke, and I'm super proud of you! PROM bhi nikal jayega easily IA and Arabic like your baby. Please Please sleep early as your exam is early morning. Your mind needs to be well rested so you can ace both the exams back to back. It's gonna be challenging but my Durr is a warrior and she'll overcome anything!🩷 Also, if you need a study break buddy or just wanna vent, i'm here, you're not in this alone! You're going to crush it IA 🫶🏻 يا حبي، سوف تقوم بعمل رائع في امتحاناتك غدًا، لقد حصلت على هذا!

title: A Return to Warmth
summary: A Return to Warmth around Feb 2, 2025 with funny tone and Affection energy.
representative_quote: Its a long read. So sit down, keep some water with you and read it with an honest heart. I have to tell you something and i know you ll be hurt hearing this. I wanted to say this yesterday but you're happy yesterday and i didnt want to ruin it for you. But now i cant keep it in me because the fear of losing you without telling you kills me every second. Before i say anything i absolutely want to know that my feelings for you and me being your friend are 2 different things and i have never mixed these up, I was never your friend just because I had feelings for you and i dont want to change that any further from here. I want you to listen what i have to say. I have had feeliings for you before i even started my CA it was a mere crush back then but i did like you and i never knew it would be this serious, but in my unconciousness i always was i guess. I chose CA over university because of you ( weird ikr because then it was just a crush). I wanted to earn every bit of money i can and be financially stable as soon as i can for you. I tried and i studied and i worked extremely hard(yk it better than anyone else) You know how eager ive been to get on my feet for mother, the one reason i never mentioned was you. My mothrr and you were the reasons i have done and achieved what i have and you both are the reasons why i want to earn sm to give you both the happiness you both deserve. Every time i failed it killed me because it was a step back on being with you. I am not telling you this because i did some sort of ehsaan on you, no never i want you to know that you are worthy of all of this and so much more, never settle for less. I dont want you to ackownledge anything i just needed you to hear this. Ye tou hogyi of my useless working hard. About my feelings for you, I have had feelings for you like i said since July of 2021, i dont know how i did why i did but i just did and I have loved every moment of it. The initial months were scary, you know for a guy who overthinks as much as me, i got scared and worried to the thought of anyone liking you or you liking anyone. That part i guess was the beginning of what brought me close to Allah, i prayed and i prayed alot. For the next 2 years i didnt miss a tahajud where i didnt pray for us. I did cry a bit of times ahahahahaha i will not lie but yeah. Its been 3.5 years and its always in my prayers. I think like is not the strongest word i can use right now so infact i do love you samiya, and i really like that feeling. I admire how you stand by me and are my peace in the toughest times and i really feel good when im your safe space. I dont know how exactly to say what i feel except that. i love you i care about you. Im saying everything i can think of right now (masjid me betha hu hath kaanprhhe😭). Now what the reality is; I know im not worthy of you samiya, but ever since day 1, i cannot comprehend losing you to another man. I swear i seriously cannot, that is my worst nightmare and lol while im typing this someone who barely knows you gets to have a chance, isnt that a bit unfair. Anyways, since i couldnt comprehend that thought i tried to make myself better and i swear on my Allah ever since i have tried my best to be worthy of you, be it how i talk, how my physique is, how i think, how i go with my life, how i dress and where i am financially. I have tried everyday so hard and i dont mind a day because YOU ARE WORTH IT, you're worth the hard work, the trouble the grind. I know I am still no where near being worthy of you but I am trying i promise I am. I'd do that for the rest of my life if it means to have you. There is no right thing i wouldnt do to have you. Part 2 of reality. I know, and i know well you dont like me or have feelings for me. Im aware of the reality in your house too but like i said i dont know how to give up, and you? To give up on you? I dont know how to do that. I know that you can find someone way better than me and that thought sucks for me because i tried doing nothing wrong. I know you dont believe in love and thats the toughest thing I have to get through. What i ask of you: Samiya, like i said i know the reality and trust me i have over thought every single reality before it has occured over the past 3 years. I know you dont like me i know I am not the best guy, but Samiya i want you to TRY for one time, for 1 day, i want you to try, to think about what i can offer, what your life would be with me, if i can keep you happy, if i can provide for you, if i can be the man you want me to be. The answer to all those thoughts for 1 day is all i want.All I have ever done in the last 3.5 years is try and try again and again to be with you. Please try for me, for something good that i may have done for you. I can only request you, I know how you operate and I know it will be difficult but still I really want you to, Try. If you are willing to try then theres nothing that cannot happen. Do not worry about hurting me What i think of you: I think you are an amazing person, you are mature, intellectual sensible all in the right proportions. You're humorous anr caring and more than anything youre there for people. Dont get me started on your looks ahahah. I find you attractive and i think thats more than enough to say. I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

title: A Strong Support Moment
summary: A Strong Support Moment around Apr 27, 2025 with romantic tone and Affection energy.
representative_quote: happy birthdayymeri jaan 🥺❤️ finally the mostest best day is here cos my soulmate was born on this day!!<3 hmm baby where do i start 😭 I often think back to where we were at this point exactly one year ago, sometimes when i think back to life before i met you, it feels like an absolute blank like my life was empty, missing smth, bland in colors but ab apke sath its as if everything has become so much more beautiful, so much more colorful and theres just so much more to look forward to in life IA. every single day with you has been full of love and joy and i hope its like that for us always ❤️ a life full of dates, surprises, supporting eachother ameen when I first met you, i remember clearly going home and telling my friend i met a cute guy who was really sweet, then when u gifted me a brownie i told my friend just how nice u are, and then when u gifted me for my bday, i just knew i had been falling for u all along. i love you so so much that there are no words that could ever describe, ofcourse i can try to but ull never know the extent of how much i love you properly i bet i love everything about you maaz :( from your cutuest laugh to ur gentlest voice, ur kind and caring approach to everyone u meet, ur optimistic view in life, ur efforts and ur dedication in things, ur beautiful soul, ur lame humor, the way u take care of me, the way u love me. Gosh, i am just so so lucky to have you :( my heart is so full. if you want to know what i tell my friends about you, ill finally share it with you. I tell them that you're more than just a romantic partner, you are someone thats not just my bestfriend but also someone who inspires me to be better on a daily basis, to strive to improve on who i am and its honestly because of you that I havent been spiralling into a deep depression since last summer when internship recruitment season started. youre my rock, my confidante. before meeting you, i didnt want to get married, i was ready to stay single till like 30 (literally, i used to say this) or let my mom arrange marriage me off, but now every single day i think that i cant wait to start the next chapter of my life by ur side inshaAllah. I know that it will be full of struggles but I just know we'll find our own happiness in every single phase of life inshaAllah Moreover, the fact that u entered my life and absolutely met all of my high standards, even exceeded them, still shocks me. Recently, a single friend was telling me how she thinks she'll stay alone forever bcos of how high her standards are and i rmr i literally told her, if you wait patiently, you will find someone who meets every single quality you have ever wished for and that is so so so true for us alhamdulillah alhamdulillah. I get so scared of nazar when it comes to you and me because what we have is so solid, is so perfect mashaallah that i just know kisi ki bhi ankhein lag skti kisi ki bhi nazar lag sakti and nazar is powerful enough to take lives bas I pray Allah saves us from that and its troubles. Coming to your most important quality, your relationship w Allah. What I have looked for always in a partner and I see it in you and it just excites me so much for when im finally and officially yours in a halal manner inshaAllah. I admire the way u go to masjid to offer regular prayers, I fantasise a life when one day ill be praying behind you at home inshaallah🥰 (ik that might sound regular to you but ive never had that 🥺) I want us to be two people that can always count on eachother in every single matter including our faith because that is something that fluctuates but together, for the sake of Allah, we could love eachother properly and encourage eachother to be our best versions and im just so excited IA. idky ive teared up and started cryinf while writing this hahah, its just my heart is so full of you and is aching so much just to be with you. im just so lucky and so so proud of you. you're slowly healing a part of me that i thought was permanently broken. you make every bad experience ive had w m*n seem insignificant, infact since every single experience of mine has brought me to you, in grateful it all happened. I hope you know that you have a lifelong partner, bestfriend, cheerleader, everything in me and that I am ALWAYS rooting and praying for you, for our families, for our futures inshaAllah i love you so much, have a lovely birthday IA(with me plss) and may u have many many more (with me pls) ameenn 🥺 may Allah provide u w every happiness in this life and the next ❤️ and ofcourse provide u me 🥰🥰 what else could you needd hehe 😘 jaldi se apne ghar pr batadete hain ab, i hope youre as excited and nervous as me hehe ik its going to be tough but we'll overcome it IA stay the same always, love me always🤪😜 happy birthday meri jaan 💗
